titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records of the Athletic Director
Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records of the Athletic Director
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 14, 2020 at 08:15

did.unittitle: Department of Athletics, Yale University, records of the athletic director
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, reports, memoranda, and subject files of the Yale Athletic Director.

corpname.part: Yale University. Dept. of Athletics, Physical Education, and Recreation

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-A (YRG 38-A), Records documenting administration of Yale athletic and physical education programs.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were transferred from the Department of Athletics, 2005-2006.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records of the Athletic Director (RU 983). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, reports, memoranda, and subject files of the Yale Athletic Director.

corpname.part: Yale University. Dept. of Athletics, Physical Education, and Recreation

did.unittitle: Records of Delaney Kiphuth as athletic director
Administration of Athletics in Colleges and Universities
Council of Ivy League Presidents correspondence, memoranda, minutes of meetings, etc.
Report of the Committee on Facilities
Athletic Department Improvement Program: Par I -Facilities Study
Standard Operating Procedure for Office of Athletic Director
Report of the University Commission on Athletics
Records of the office of the athletic director
AIAW- Association For Intercollegiate Athletic For Women
National Football Foundation and Hall of Fame
Committee on Coordination and Eligibility Meeting Minutes
Rules Governing the Awarding of Athletic Insignia
Rules for Awarding the "Friend of the Fencing Team" Cup
The Touchdown Club of New York
Track Yale/Harvard Oxford Director's Files Cambridge
Radley H. Daly Association Provost for Personnel
Community Safety and Health for Athletes
Special Events Use of Yale Fields
Records of Delaney Kiphuth as athletic director
Yale AA Rules Governing Awards -Master Sheets
Complimentary Tickets and Inside the Bowl Parking
